summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of KLEAN Barbershop premium website. All major functionality working excellently including navigation, booking system, gallery filters, FAQ accordions, mobile responsiveness, and animations.

deployment_issues.issue: Direct URL access fails (e.g., /prestations, /galerie) - returns 404 or blank page
deployment_issues.impact: Users cannot bookmark or share direct links to pages
deployment_issues.workaround: Navigation through app works perfectly - this is a server configuration issue for SPA routing

passed_tests: Homepage hero section with KLEAN title and elegant subtitle
Navigation across all 8 pages via menu links
Setmore booking button integration (opens in new tab)
Services page with € pricing and service cards
Gallery page with 6 working filters (Tout, Coupes, Barbes, Tresses, Locks, Salon)
Contact page with Google Maps integration
Complete contact information (address, phone, Instagram links)
Framer Motion animations (fade in, scale, hover effects)
action_item_for_main_agent: Configure server-side routing for SPA to handle direct URL access. Add server redirect rules to serve index.html for client-side routes. This is a deployment configuration issue, not a code issue.
